ucs.title: [LLM] Saint Bear (UAC-0056) spearphish-to-Saint Bot dropper chain via JS/LNK + PowerShell download cradle
ucs.description: Hunts Saint Bear's characteristic initial-access pattern: a spoofed Ukrainian/Georgian government-themed email delivers a malicious archive containing a JS, LNK, or weaponized document that spawns wscript/cscript/Word, which in turn launches PowerShell with an outbound download cradle to a staging host (commonly Discord CDN, compromised WordPress, or attacker-registered look-alike domains used by UAC-0056) to retrieve Saint Bot or OutSteel.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmd values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("wscript.exe","cscript.exe","winword.exe","excel.exe","explorer.exe","mshta.exe") AND Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process_id Processes.process_id _time span=1h
| `drop_dm_object_name("Processes")`
| where match(process,"(?i)(IEX|Invoke-Expression|DownloadString|DownloadFile|Net\.WebClient|Invoke-WebRequest|-enc |FromBase64String|wget |curl )") OR match(process,"(?i)(discordapp\.com/attachments|cdn\.discord|pastebin|raw\.githubusercontent|ngrok\.io|trycloudflare|workers\.dev)")
| join type=inner dest [
    | tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Email where Email.file_name IN ("*.lnk","*.js","*.vbs","*.iso","*.zip","*.rar","*.7z","*.docx","*.xlsx","*.scr") by Email.recipient Email.src_user Email.subject Email.file_name _time span=24h
    | `drop_dm_object_name("Email")`
    | rename recipient as user_email
    | eval dest=user_email
    | where match(subject,"(?i)(уряд|міністерств|податков|ДПС|СБУ|поліц|government|ministry|tax|police|invoice|contract|регламент|постанов)") OR match(src_user,"(?i)(\.gov\.ua|\.gov\.ge|gov-ua|gov-ge|mil\.gov)")]
| stats count min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime values(parent_process_name) as parents values(process) as cmds values(file_name) as lures values(subject) as subjects by dest user
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
| where count >= 1
ucs.kql:
let lures = EmailAttachmentInfo
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where FileName matches regex @"(?i)\.(lnk|js|jse|vbs|vbe|iso|img|zip|rar|7z|docx|xlsx|scr|hta)$"
| join kind=inner (EmailEvents | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where Subject matches regex @"(?i)(уряд|міністерств|податков|ДПС|СБУ|поліц|government|ministry|tax|police|invoice|contract|регламент|постанов)"
        or SenderFromDomain matches regex @"(?i)(gov-ua|gov-ge|gov\.ua|gov\.ge|mil\.gov|ukr-gov|ge-gov)"
) on NetworkMessageId
| project Timestamp, RecipientEmailAddress, SenderFromAddress, Subject, FileName, SHA256;
let stage1 = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("wscript.exe","cscript.exe","winword.exe","excel.exe","explorer.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe")
| where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe")
| where ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(IEX|Invoke-Expression|DownloadString|DownloadFile|Net\.WebClient|Invoke-WebRequest|-enc\s|FromBase64String|certutil.*-urlcache|bitsadmin.*\/transfer)"
    or ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(discordapp\.com/attachments|cdn\.discord|pastebin\.com/raw|raw\.githubusercontent|ngrok\.io|trycloudflare|workers\.dev|\.ru/|\.xyz/|\.top/)"
| project StageTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountUpn, InitiatingProcessFileName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
stage1
| join kind=inner (lures | extend AccountUpn=tolower(RecipientEmailAddress)) on AccountUpn
| where StageTime between (Timestamp .. Timestamp + 6h)
| project StageTime, DeviceName, AccountUpn, SenderFromAddress, Subject, FileName1=FileName, LureFile=FileName1, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by StageTime desc
ucs.rationale: Saint Bear / UAC-0056 / Lorec53 has consistently impersonated Ukrainian and Georgian government bodies (DPS tax service, SBU, Ministry of Defense) in lure subjects and sender domains, and Unit 42, CERT-UA and Cybereason all document the same multi-stage chain: archive with JS/LNK/weaponized Office doc → script-host or Office spawning PowerShell → external download of Saint Bot or OutSteel from Dis

ucs.title: [LLM] Saint Bot / OutSteel post-exec persistence: masqueraded binary in %APPDATA% with Run-key persistence and AV-evasion registry tampering
ucs.description: Hunts the post-installation behavior shared by Saint Bot and OutSteel: a packed/code-signed dropper writes a renamed PE (often masquerading as a legitimate Microsoft or imaging utility) into %APPDATA%/%LOCALAPPDATA%, registers a Run-key for persistence, and modifies Defender / SmartScreen registry values — a signature combination repeatedly tied to Saint Bear by Unit 42 and Cybereason.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.file_path IN ("*\\AppData\\Roaming\\*","*\\AppData\\Local\\*","*\\ProgramData\\*") AND Filesystem.file_name IN ("*.exe","*.dll","*.scr") by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.user Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.process_id _time span=1h
| `drop_dm_object_name("Filesystem")`
| where match(file_name,"(?i)^(WindowsUpdate|MicrosoftEdgeUpdate|ImagingDevices|svchost|conhost|csrss|RuntimeBroker|OneDrive|AdobeUpdate|chrome|firefox)\.exe$") AND NOT match(file_path,"(?i)\\\\Microsoft\\\\|\\\\Windows\\\\|Program Files")
| join type=inner dest process_id [
    | tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Endpoint.Registry where (Registry.registry_path="*\\CurrentVersion\\Run\\*" OR Registry.registry_path="*\\Policies\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\*" OR Registry.registry_path="*\\SmartScreenEnabled*" OR Registry.registry_path="*\\DisableAntiSpyware*" OR Registry.registry_path="*\\DisableRealtimeMonitoring*") by Registry.dest Registry.process_id Registry.registry_path Registry.registry_value_data
    | `drop_dm_object_name("Registry")`]
| stats count values(file_path) as dropped_files values(registry_path) as reg_changes values(registry_value_data) as reg_data by dest user process_id
| where mvcount(reg_changes) >= 2 OR (mvcount(reg_changes) >=1 AND mvcount(dropped_files) >=1)
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let dropped = DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed")
| where FolderPath matches regex @"(?i)\\(AppData\\Roaming|AppData\\Local|ProgramData)\\"
| where FileName matches regex @"(?i)^(WindowsUpdate|MicrosoftEdgeUpdate|ImagingDevices|svchost|conhost|csrss|RuntimeBroker|OneDrive|AdobeUpdate|chrome|firefox)\.exe$"
| where not(FolderPath has_any ("\\Microsoft\\","\\Windows\\","Program Files"))
| project DropTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName=InitiatingProcessAccountName, FolderPath, FileName, SHA256, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
let runkey = DeviceRegistryEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where ActionType in ("RegistryValueSet","RegistryKeyCreated")
| where RegistryKey has_any (
    @"\CurrentVersion\Run",
    @"\CurrentVersion\RunOnce",
    @"Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender",
    @"\SmartScreenEnabled",
    @"\DisableAntiSpyware",
    @"\DisableRealtimeMonitoring",
    @"\Explorer\Advanced\Hidden")
| project RegTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, RegistryKey, RegistryValueName, RegistryValueData, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessSHA256, InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
dropped
| join kind=inner runkey on DeviceId
| where RegTime between (DropTime - 30m .. DropTime + 2h)
| summarize Drops=make_set(strcat(FolderPath,FileName)), RegOps=make_set(RegistryKey), RegData=make_set(RegistryValueData), Procs=make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName1), FirstSeen=min(DropTime), LastSeen=max(RegTime) by DeviceName, AccountName, SHA256
| where array_length(RegOps) >= 1 and array_length(Drops) >= 1
| extend SuspiciousScore = array_length(RegOps) + array_length(Drops)
| where SuspiciousScore >= 2
| sort by LastSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Unit 42's OutSteel/SaintBot reporting and CERT-UA's UAC-0056 advisories repeatedly describe the same install pattern: a packed loader (sometimes signed with stolen/look-alike certs — T1553.002) drops a renamed binary masquerading as ImagingDevices.exe, WindowsUpdate.exe, or MicrosoftEdgeUpdate.exe into the user-writable AppData tree, sets a Run key, and tampers with Defender/SmartScreen registry v
